radius.$description: M3 dialog container shape: md.sys.shape.corner.extra-large (28dp) via the material3 radius scale.

padding.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the dialog component for padding.

gap.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the dialog component for gap.

min-width.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the dialog component for min width (surface size scale; to be refined in Fase M3).

max-width.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the dialog component for max width (surface size scale; to be refined in Fase M3).

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the dialog component for background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the dialog component for foreground.

border.$description: Material 3 border used by the dialog component for border.

shadow.$description: M3 dialog container elevation: md.sys.elevation.level3 via ki.elevation.e3 (replaces the migrated approximation).

backdrop-bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the dialog component for backdrop background.

font-size.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the dialog component for heading font size.

font-weight.$description: Material 3 font weight used by the dialog component for heading font weight.

line-height.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the dialog component for heading line height.
